---
title: "Projects"
---

The lab develops research projects focused on neurosurgical outcomes, prediction models, web-based calculators, and reproducible research workflows.

## Active project areas

### Web-based predictive calculators

Interactive calculators are developed when a model can be translated into a usable public-facing research tool.

### Outcomes research

Projects use national registry and institutional data sources to study patterns of care, survival, disparities, and utilization.

### Clinical informatics

Projects explore scalable workflows for structured variable extraction, documentation, and reproducible analysis.

### Perioperative and quality improvement work

Projects evaluate care processes, outcomes, and opportunities for quality improvement.
